name: _DoIP_PowerModeInformationResponse
title: _DoIP_PowerModeInformationResponse
description: The tester received a response for a Power Mode Information Request. The vehicle's IP address is given as first argument, in text form.

parameters.name: IPaddress
parameters.description: Address in text form, e.g. “169.254.32.1” (IPv4) or “2001::1” (IPv6).
